subcodes.first_line: O Divine Educator of newcomers, thy letter was received and the heart was gladdened that thou art successful in the blessed task of teaching children [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مربی نورسیدگان الهی نامه ات رسید قلب مسرور شد که موفق بر امر مبروری اطفال
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @education of children; moral education, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
